author: mszturc
description: Insert, scale, rotate and cut-out PDF pages into your notes.

manifest.author: MSzturc
manifest.description: Goal of this Plugin in to implement a native PDF handling workflow
manifest.name: Better PDF Plugin

name: Better PDF Plugin

releases.author: MSzturc
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add base scale multiplier to viewport based on actual canvas width by @batman-nair in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/31
* Implement "Whole Document" with Page 0 as alias by @m0rtis0 in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/29
* Added support for relative path by @wxxedu in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/17

## New Contributors
* @batman-nair made their first contribution in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/31
* @m0rtis0 made their first contribution in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/29
* @wxxedu made their first contribution in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/17

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0
releases.name: Fixed scaling issues

releases.author: MSzturc
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Added page range functionality. by @SkyeC0re in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/6
* Update dependencies and remove unnecessary ones. by @luleyleo in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/12
* Add option to auto scale pages by @luleyleo in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/14
* Add support to include ranges by @luleyleo in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/13
* Make linking optional by @luleyleo in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/15
* Add settings page by @luleyleo in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/16

## New Contributors
* @SkyeC0re made their first contribution in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/6
* @luleyleo made their first contribution in https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/pull/12

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MSzturc/obsidian-better-pdf-plugin/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0
releases.name: Added Range support

releases.author: MSzturc
releases.description:
### Features:
- Its now possible to use internal links as url
releases.name: Internal Links support

releases.author: MSzturc
releases.description:
### Features

- Insert a single PDF Page inside Note
- Insert a List of Pages into Obsidian Note
- Hyperlink to PDF
- Scale the size of PDF Pages to fit Note layout
- Rotate PDF
- Cutout PDF Parts
releases.name: First public release
